final_metric_interpretation: The average vendor lead time across all vendors and months is 10.47 days, calculated from the time lag between purchase order creation (EKKO.BEDAT) and goods receipt posting (EKBE.BUDAT) for movement type 1 (goods receipt). This metric represents the typical procurement cycle duration from order placement to physical receipt. The vendor×month grain aggregation (AF025) shows variation across vendors and time periods, with lead times ranging from approximately 8 to 13 days in the sampled data, indicating moderate variability in supplier delivery performance.
term_conditions_covered: ["EKKO.BEDAT must not be null", "EKBE.BUDAT must not be null", "EKBE.BUDAT must be >= EKKO.BEDAT (receipts cannot predate orders)", "EKBE.VGABE = '1' to filter for goods receipt postings only"]
